name: gate-export-not-registered
description: The contract's `clientCapabilities.gadgets` references the export `useDoorDashCheckout` under `@acme/checkout` — a (package, export) pair absent from every descriptor in the app's registered `App.gadgets` catalog. The push-time gadget gate (SPEC §7.7.2 — `assertGadgetsRegistered`) MUST reject with code `gadget_not_registered`: the most-fundamental miss class, where the export name itself is unknown.
